name: The Quest
description: A protagonist or group pursues a defined objective, overcoming escalating obstacles that test commitment and cohesion.

nodes.label: Home Ground
nodes.definition: The protagonist's starting community or environment, which either sends or compels the quester toward the objective.
entry_conditions: The objective is not yet known or not yet urgent
exit_conditions: The objective is defined and departure becomes necessary
typical_variants: Stagnant society needing something to survive
Character with a personal lack the quest may fill
failure_modes: No reason for the audience to care about this community or character
Home is so unpleasant that departure carries no weight

nodes.label: Objective Defined
nodes.definition: The quest's target is identified — an object, place, person, or piece of knowledge that must be obtained. The goal is specific and external.
entry_conditions: A need or threat makes the objective urgent
exit_conditions: The protagonist accepts the mission and begins assembling resources
typical_variants: Dying request or command from authority
failure_modes: Objective is too vague to drive action
Objective seems trivial — why risk everything for it?

nodes.label: Gathering Companions
nodes.definition: The protagonist assembles the group needed for the journey. Each companion brings a distinct capability or perspective.
entry_conditions: The quest cannot be accomplished alone
exit_conditions: The core group is formed and the journey begins
typical_variants: Unlikely allies forced together by circumstance
failure_modes: Companions are interchangeable or have no distinct function
Assembly takes so long it delays momentum
signals_in_text: Introduction of new characters with distinct traits

nodes.label: Journey Trials
nodes.definition: The group encounters obstacles on the path — environmental, adversarial, or interpersonal — that test their capabilities and commitment.
entry_conditions: The group is formed and traveling
The objective is not yet within reach
exit_conditions: The group has been tested enough to face the central obstacle
typical_variants: Internal conflict that threatens group cohesion
failure_modes: Trials are episodic with no escalation
No trial threatens the group's unity
Trials don't connect to the objective

nodes.label: Cohesion Test
nodes.definition: A crisis reveals hidden fractures in the group — conflicting motives, secrets, or breaking points that threaten to dissolve the quest.
entry_conditions: Journey trials have stressed the group
exit_conditions: The group either fractures or recommits with renewed clarity
typical_variants: Discovery that the objective is not what it seemed
failure_modes: No real consequence of the fracture

nodes.label: Final Approach
nodes.definition: The group nears the objective, entering the most dangerous territory. Resources are depleted, options are few, and the cost of the quest is fully visible.
entry_conditions: The group has recommitted after the cohesion test
The objective is close but heavily guarded
exit_conditions: The group stands at the threshold of the final challenge
typical_variants: A last calm before the storm
failure_modes: No escalation from the journey trials

nodes.label: Climactic Ordeal
nodes.definition: The final confrontation with the obstacle guarding the objective. Success requires applying everything the group has learned and sacrificing something irreplaceable.
entry_conditions: The group is at the point of the objective
exit_conditions: The objective is obtained or definitively lost
failure_modes: Victory depends on a convenient power-up rather than earned capability
signals_in_text: Use of skills or knowledge from earlier trials

nodes.label: Objective Won
nodes.definition: The quest's target is obtained. The group possesses what they came for, but the cost is now clear.
exit_conditions: The group must decide what to do with the objective

nodes.label: Homecoming
nodes.definition: The group returns (or settles) with the objective fulfilled. The community or the questers themselves are changed by what was gained and what was lost.
entry_conditions: The return journey is complete or underway
typical_variants: Home is no longer the same
failure_modes: No visible impact of the quest on the characters or community

edges.label: Need Emerges
edges.preconditions: Home ground is established; an external or internal need becomes urgent
edges.effects_on_stakes: The community's or character's survival becomes conditional on obtaining the objective
edges.effects_on_character: Protagonist shifts from passive to purposeful
edges.common_alternatives: Objective was always known but urgency suddenly increases
edges.anti_patterns: Objective appears arbitrarily with no connection to the home ground

edges.label: Assembles the Team
edges.preconditions: The objective requires capabilities the protagonist lacks alone
edges.effects_on_stakes: New interpersonal dynamics create both strength and vulnerability
edges.effects_on_character: Protagonist becomes a leader; must negotiate and delegate
edges.common_alternatives: Companions are pre-existing allies rather than newly recruited
edges.anti_patterns: Team is assembled instantly with no friction or negotiation

edges.label: Sets Out
edges.preconditions: The group is formed; departure marks the point of no return
edges.effects_on_stakes: Home recedes; the group is now on its own
edges.effects_on_character: Group dynamics begin to form under pressure
edges.common_alternatives: Departure is forced by attack on the home ground
edges.anti_patterns: Departure has no emotional weight; no one cares about leaving

edges.label: Tensions Surface
edges.preconditions: Trials have stressed the group; hidden conflicts emerge
edges.effects_on_stakes: The quest itself is at risk if the group fragments
edges.effects_on_character: True motives and loyalties are exposed
edges.common_alternatives: Cohesion test is triggered by an external event that exposes fractures
edges.anti_patterns: Group conflict is artificial or resolves in a single scene

edges.label: Group Recommits
edges.preconditions: The cohesion crisis is resolved; the group is smaller or more unified
edges.effects_on_stakes: Remaining members are fully invested; no more half-measures
edges.effects_on_character: Bonds are deepened through shared crisis
edges.common_alternatives: A member leaves but the rest carry on; a member's sacrifice reunites the group
edges.anti_patterns: Recommitment is costless; nothing changed from the cohesion test

edges.label: Engages Final Obstacle
edges.preconditions: The group is at the threshold of the objective; the guardian or barrier is present
edges.effects_on_stakes: All-or-nothing; the quest succeeds or fails here
edges.effects_on_character: Each member's distinct capability is called upon
edges.common_alternatives: The ordeal is a test of worthiness rather than combat
edges.anti_patterns: Final obstacle is easier than the journey trials

edges.label: Claims the Prize
edges.preconditions: The ordeal is survived; the cost is paid
edges.effects_on_stakes: Immediate danger subsides but loss is felt
edges.effects_on_character: The group is changed; victory is tempered by what was lost
edges.common_alternatives: Prize is different from what was expected; winning transforms the prize itself
edges.anti_patterns: Victory is costless; nothing was sacrificed

edges.label: Returns Home
edges.preconditions: The objective is secured; the return journey is possible
edges.effects_on_stakes: Stakes resolve as the community receives what it needed
edges.effects_on_character: Questers are permanently changed; home no longer fits the same way
edges.common_alternatives: Questers settle elsewhere; home has changed in their absence
edges.anti_patterns: Return is glossed over; no reflection on the journey's impact
